attractions.name: Dal Lake
attractions.description: The iconic urban lake in Srinagar, famous for its houseboats and floating markets.

attractions.name: Mata Vaishno Devi Shrine
attractions.description: A highly revered Hindu pilgrimage site located in the Trikuta Mountains.

attractions.name: Gulmarg Gondola
attractions.description: One of the world's highest cable cars, offering panoramic Himalayan views and skiing.

attractions.name: Dachigam National Park
attractions.description: A protected area home to the critically endangered Kashmir stag (Hangul).

attractions.name: Shankaracharya Temple
attractions.description: An ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, overlooking Srinagar city.

attractions.name: Nishat Bagh
attractions.description: A beautiful Mughal garden terraced with fountains and flowerbeds overlooking Dal Lake.

attractions.name: Bahú Fort
attractions.description: A historic fort in Jammu city overlooking the Tawi River, featuring a temple dedicated to Goddess Kali.

attractions.name: Kishtwar National Park
attractions.description: Rugged terrain known for high-altitude wildlife including the Himalayan Snowcock.

restaurants.name: Ahdoos
restaurants.description: Famous for authentic Kashmiri Wazwan and traditional cuisine in Srinagar.

restaurants.name: Mughal Darbar
restaurants.description: Renowned for its traditional multi-course Wazwan feasts.

restaurants.name: Falaks
restaurants.description: Offers panoramic views of Jammu city with a mix of Indian and Continental dishes.

restaurants.name: Pahalwan Di Hatti
restaurants.description: A legendary spot in Jammu for local snacks like Kaladi Kulcha.

hidden_gems.name: Doodhpathri
hidden_gems.description: A serene, offbeat meadow often called the 'Valley of Milk', perfect for trekking.

nightlife.name: Srinagar Houseboat Decks
nightlife.description: Evening relaxation on the deck of a houseboat on Dal Lake is the primary 'nightlife' experience.

shopping.name: Lal Chowk
shopping.description: The bustling heart of Srinagar, ideal for buying Pashmina shawls and papier-mâché.

shopping.name: Raghunath Bazaar
shopping.description: Famous for dry fruits, saffron, and traditional Dogra handicrafts in Jammu.

festivals.name: Navratri
festivals.description: Celebrated with great fervor, especially in the Jammu region near the Vaishno Devi shrine.

festivals.name: Lohri
festivals.description: A popular harvest festival celebrated with traditional folk dances in Jammu.

adventure_activities.name: Trekking in Pahalgam
adventure_activities.description: Explore the various mountain trails starting from Pahalgam, including the route to Amarnath.

local_tips: Always carry a valid photo ID as security checks are frequent.
Try the local Kahwa tea, a saffron-infused drink, to stay warm.
Respect local customs when visiting religious shrines by dressing modestly.
Check road conditions for the Jammu-Srinagar highway before traveling, especially in winter.

safety.general: The security situation can be volatile. Monitor local news and government advisories closely.
safety.water_safety: Drink only bottled or purified water.
safety.transport_safety: Avoid night travel on mountain roads due to landslides and poor visibility.

culture.overview: A blend of Sufi, Hindu, and Central Asian influences with a strong tradition of hospitality.
culture.etiquette: Remove shoes before entering shrines and homes. Ask permission before taking photos of locals or military installations.

transport.getting_around: Taxis and local buses are the primary modes of transport. Hiring a local driver for mountain routes is recommended.
transport.airport: Srinagar International Airport (SXR) and Jammu Airport (IXJ).

visa_information.domestic_indian_travellers: No visa required; valid government photo ID is mandatory.
visa_information.foreign_nationals: Valid passport and Indian visa required. Some areas may require a Protected Area Permit.

weather.best_time_to_visit: April to October for pleasant weather; December to February for snow sports.
weather.avoid: Late monsoon (July-August) due to potential landslides.
